title: delphinium trichophorum subsp. platycentrum
intro: Delphinium trichophorum subsp. platycentrum, also known as the white larkspur, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Delphinium trichophorum subsp. platycentrum include its ability to relieve muscle spasms, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as a sedative. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including insomnia and anxiety.
